mapper.sql: t.id, t.snapshot_id, t.order_id, t.model_code, t.model_name, t.config_code, t.config_name, t.color_code, t.color_name, t.option_snapshot, t.sale_scope_code, t.display_snapshot, t.snapshot_version, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_vehicle_snapshot ( snapshot_id, order_id, model_code, model_name, config_code, config_name, color_code, color_name, option_snapshot, sale_scope_code, display_snapshot, snapshot_version, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{snapshotId}, #{orderId}, #{modelCode}, #{modelName}, #{configCode}, #{configName}, #{colorCode}, #{colorName}, #{optionSnapshot}, #{saleScopeCode}, #{displaySnapshot}, #{snapshotVersion}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_vehicle_snapshot ( snapshot_id, order_id, model_code, model_name, config_code, config_name, color_code, color_name, option_snapshot, sale_scope_code, display_snapshot, snapshot_version, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.snapshotId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.modelCode}, #{item.modelName}, #{item.configCode}, #{item.configName}, #{item.colorCode}, #{item.colorName}, #{item.optionSnapshot}, #{item.saleScopeCode}, #{item.displaySnapshot}, #{item.snapshotVersion}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t SET
t.option_snapshot = #{optionSnapshot},
t.display_snapshot = #{displaySnapshot},
t.snapshot_version = #{snapshotVersion},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
